title: ProspectIndex
description: Append-only cross-session index of `could-be-tool` candidates. Stored at opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/knowledge/prospect-index.json. Each entry records a file/config that looks like an undiscovered tool surface but has not yet been confirmed. Merged from checkpoint.<n>.json `prospects[]` via append-only semantics: existing records have `sessions_observed[]` appended and `score` is taken as the max across observations.

score.description: Maximum confidence observed across all sessions.

sessions_observed.description: Session ids in which this prospect was observed (deduplicated).
